description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6-stretch Docker image. Add a test stage containing a run_tests job that runs the before_script commands: apt-get update && apt-get --yes install graphviz, cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR, pip3 install pipenv, pipenv sync, then runs pipenv run pytest -vv ./tests. Set the DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive variable for the job and configure it to always run (when: always).
